item.title: Iran’s Last-Stand Strategy
item.description: The regime’s armed forces are mounting the very offensive that was expected to accompany the theocracy’s final moments.

item.title: Over Iran, U.S. and Israeli Aircraft Fly as Equals
item.description: Israel has emerged as the Middle East’s preeminent military power just as the U.S. seeks to reduce its permanent footprint in the region.

item.title: The Epstein Panic
item.description: There’s a reason that it is not the usual practice of the DOJ to release unverified, disparaging information about people it’s not charging with crime...

item.title: The New Machine Gets Its Spoils
item.description: Zohran Mamdani’s choice for a key foreign policy position in his administration shows the power of a progressive Tammany Hall.

item.title: No, Mr. President, Section 122 Tariffs Won’t Work Either
item.description: Despite Donald Trump’s claims, history shows that Section 122 does not justify his new tariffs.
